【Day 12】My First PC Upgrade: From No-More-Cafés Punishment to Learning HDDs, SSDs, and RAM
Code Review of My Youth - From the BIOS Beep to Software Engineering

From being banned from internet cafés to upgrading a hand-me-down computer: learning HDD/SSD differences and interfaces, TBW longevity concepts, and RAM capacity and frequency basics. Includes capacity recommendations by use case as upgrade-planning reference.
